message:
feat(search): implement FastEmbed ONNX inference engine integration (ft-344j8.14)

Replace the FastEmbedEmbedder stub with a real implementation wrapping
the fastembed crate for ONNX-accelerated sentence embeddings:

- FastEmbedConfig with model selection, cache dir, max_length
- Graceful degradation: try_init_fastembed() + best_available_embedder()
  falls back to HashEmbedder when ONNX loading fails
- Offline-first: models cached in ~/.cache/frankenterm/fastembed
- Thread-safe: Arc<TextEmbedding> for Send+Sync sharing
- Native batch inference via embed_batch()
- Daemon worker updated to accept fastembed-* model selectors
- 25 unit tests (config, dimension, integration with cached model)
- 32 worker tests pass with updated build_embedder returning trait objects

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
